Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re

with open\('/Users/trivo/Development/o1js/src/bindings/compiled/node_bindings/plonk_wasm.cjs', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find all functions/getters with @returns {number} that have bare return ret;
lines = content.split\('\\n'\)
i = 0
issues = []

while i < len\(lines\):
    if '@returns {number}' in lines[i]:
        # Look ahead for return statements
        j = i + 1
        found_bare_ret = False
        indent = None
        while j < min\(i + 20, len\(lines\)\):
            if 'return ret;' in lines[j]:
                # Check if it's wrapped with Number\(\)
                if 'return Number\(ret\);' not in lines[j]:
                    found_bare_ret = True
                    # Find the function/getter name
                    k = i - 1
                    while k >= max\(0, i-15\) and k >= 0:
                        if 'function ' in lines[k] or 'get ' in lines[k] or 'set ' in lines[k]:
                            issues.append\(\(k+1, lines[k].strip\(\), j+1, lines[j].strip\(\)\)\)
                            break
                        k -= 1
                break
            j += 1
    i += 1

if issues:
    print\("Found bare 'return ret;' with @returns {number} \(potentially missing Number\(\)\):"\)
    for line_no, context, ret_line, ret_code in issues[:20]:
        print\(f"Line {line_no}: {context}"\)
        print\(f"  Line {ret_line}: {ret_code}"\)
else:
    print\("All @returns {number} are properly wrapped!"\)
EOF)
